SCD_MEDICAID Sickle Cell Disease Indicator- Medicaid Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having Sickle Cell Disease. Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not
